ribbon.title: Lab Facilities
ribbon.description: State-of-the-art equipment and infrastructure supporting cutting-edge research in advanced composite materials.

equipment.name: Scanning Electron Microscope
equipment.description: High-resolution imaging of composite microstructures and failure surfaces with EDS capability for elemental analysis.

equipment.name: Universal Testing Machine
equipment.description: Servo-hydraulic testing system for fatigue, tensile, compression and fracture testing of composite specimens.

equipment.name: Autoclave
equipment.description: Precision autoclave for high-performance thermoset and thermoplastic composite laminate consolidation under controlled temperature and pressure.

equipment.name: X-Ray CT Scanner
equipment.description: Non-destructive 3D tomographic inspection of composite parts for internal defects, porosity and delamination.

equipment.name: Differential Scanning Calorimeter
equipment.description: Measures thermal transitions including cure kinetics, Tg, crystallinity and specific heat of polymer composites.

equipment.name: Filament Winding Machine
equipment.description: CNC-controlled 6-axis filament winding for manufacturing cylindrical and complex-geometry fibre-reinforced composite structures.

equipment.name: Raman Spectrometer
equipment.description: Confocal Raman microscopy for molecular characterisation of fibres, matrices and fibre–matrix interfaces in composites.

equipment.name: High-Performance Computing Cluster
equipment.description: Dedicated cluster for FEM simulations, molecular dynamics and machine-learning assisted material modelling.

equipment.name: Dynamic Mechanical Analyser
equipment.description: Measures viscoelastic properties, storage modulus and damping of composite materials across temperature and frequency sweeps.

info.title: Access & Booking
items: Open Monday to Saturday, 8 AM – 8 PM
Equipment booking via lab portal (48 hr advance)
Weekend slots available on prior request

info.title: Safety Guidelines
items: Mandatory lab induction before first use
PPE (gloves, goggles, lab coat) required at all times
Chemical handling as per SDS guidelines
Emergency contacts posted at each workstation

info.title: Training & Support
items: Monthly hands-on workshop for new members
SOP documents available on lab portal
